memoryArtifacts.description:
PABODIE (PEABODY) FAMILY
June 27, 2016


1.JOHN PAYBODY (1460-1520)
AGNES UNKNOWN (1460- )

JOHN PAYBODY was born about 1460 in England to unknown parents. He married Agnes Unknown.

John Paybody died …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody於1500年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾諾瑟利時，他的父親Robert Peabody20歲，母親Margarett Erskine20歲。他於1558年與Alice Sulyard在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他去世於1569年在英國諾薩普頓史爾沃索普享年69歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯塔福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Peabody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname ‘peacock-body’, from Middle English pe, pey, pay (Old English pēa) ‘peacock’ + body, perhaps for a vain person who dressed ostentatiously. Compare Pea , Peacock .

History: The prominent financier and philanthropist George Peabody was born 1795 in South Danvers, now Peabody, MA. His first ancestor in America was Francis Peabody, who emigrated from England in 1635 and settled at Topsfield, MA.

variants.name: Pea
meanings: nickname from Middle English pa(we), po(we) ‘peacock’ (Old English pāwa and Old Norse pá). See Peacock . Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Pawe (Old English Pāwa), Latinized as Pavo, and derived from the nickname.
from the Middle English personal name Paw(e), a pet form of Paulin or occasionally Paul. See Pawson , Paulin .

nameMeanings.name: Paybody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peabody
meanings: English: nickname ‘peacock-body’, from Middle English pe, pey, pay (Old English pēa) ‘peacock’ + body, perhaps for a vain person who dressed ostentatiously. Compare Pea , Peacock .

History: The prominent financier and philanthropist George Peabody was born 1795 in South Danvers, now Peabody, MA. His first ancestor in America was Francis Peabody, who emigrated from England in 1635 and settled at Topsfield, MA.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody was born in 1500, in Noseley, Leicestershire, England, his father, Robert Peabody, was 20 and his mother, Margarett Erskine, was 20. He married Alice Sulyard in 1558, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1569, in Wothorpe, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Staverton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody est né en 1500, à Noseley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Peabody, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margarett Erskine, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Sulyard en 1558, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1569, à Wothorpe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Staverton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybodyが1500年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアノセリーで生まれた時，父Robert Peabodyは20歳，母Margarett Erskineは20歳であった。1558年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでAlice Sulyardと結婚した。彼は1569年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウオソルペで69歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody(이)가 1500년 영국 레이스스터실르 노셀이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Peabody(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarett Erskine(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Alice Sulyard(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1569년 영국 노르섬프토실르 보소에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 스타버턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Alice Sulyard em 1558, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody родился в 1500 г. в местности носели, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Peabody было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarett Erskine, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Sulyard в 1558 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1569 г. в местности вотаурп, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ставиртон, нортамптоншир, Англия.
